a260711p1.summary: Elliott Investment Management has built a large stake in car-insurance software provider CCC Intelligent Solutions Holdings Inc. …
a260711p1.title: Sources: activist investor Elliott has built a large stake in car insurance software maker CCC, which is exploring a potential sale and has a ~$3.5B market cap (Bloomberg)

a260711p2.summary: The chip maker's business is improving, with government twisting the arms of potential customers and partners including Apple and Nvidia
a260711p2.title: Sources detail the Trump admin's heavy-handed intervention to aid Intel, including pushing it to expand local capacity and pressuring Apple to use Intel's fabs (Robbie Whelan/Wall Street Journal)

a260711p3.summary: A first look at analytics from our Pangram Chrome extension — Two months ago, we launched our Chrome extension to help combat the rising slop problem on social media.
a260711p3.title: An analysis of 1M+ social media posts from April 24 to June 30: ~25% of longform posts with 250+ words were fully AI-generated; on LinkedIn, the figure was 41% (Max Spero/Pangram Labs)

a260711p4.summary: South Korean memory chipmaker SK Hynix Inc. just pulled off the largest public listing by a foreign company in US market history.
a260711p4.title: SK Hynix's historic US stock market listing is a bet that the AI boom is breaking the memory chip industry's decades-long boom-and-bust cycle (Bloomberg)
